Details: Iron-catalyzed hydrogen peroxide is effective in reducing MTBE in contaminated water. One study showed the effectiveness of using zero-valent iron (Fe) as the iron source in Fenton’s oxidation for treating MTBE contaminated water. Fenton’s oxidation with iron removed over 99% of MTBE at pH 4.0 and 7.0 with H2O2: MTBE molar ratio of 220:1.  Reaction times were atypically long.
